source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — E. H. Harriman Alaska Expedition
artist: Edward H. Harriman Alaska Expedition photographers (C. Hart Merriam and team)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Kodiak, Alaska — birds-eye view (Harriman Alaska Expedition, 1899)
description: 1899 birds-eye photograph of Kodiak village from the hills behind the town, showing the Russian Orthodox church at center, a steamship at the wharf, and the full layout of the town along the harbor. Taken during the Edward H. Harriman Alaska Expedition that cruised Alaska waters from May through July 1899 with a team of leading American scientists and artists.
alt: 1899 birds-eye-view photograph of Kodiak, Alaska village showing the Russian Orthodox church, wharf, steamship, and houses along the harbor
